hero.title: JETS INDEX
hero.subtitle: Your comprehensive encyclopedia
hero.description: A definitive resource for exploring aircraft, naval vessels, and military systems from around the world.

goal.title: Our Goal
goal.content: Our goal is to create the most comprehensive and accessible database of military aviation platforms, providing defense enthusiasts, researchers, and military professionals with accurate, well-organized information about aircraft, naval vessels, and military systems from around the world.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.content: We envision Jets Index becoming the definitive reference for military platform documentation, offering 10 unique UI design concepts that showcase the diversity and complexity of global defense systems while making this information accessible to everyone.

purpose.title: Our Purpose
purpose.content: Jets Index exists to bridge the gap between complex military technology and public understanding. We are dedicated to documenting, categorizing, and presenting military platforms in a way that educates and inspires the next generation of defense professionals and aviation enthusiasts.

whatsNext.title: What's Next
whatsNext.content: We are continuously expanding our database and developing new ways to explore military platforms. Upcoming features include advanced comparison tools, detailed technical specifications, and interactive visualizations.
